title: Section 1A
content: 1[1A. Securities to which this Act applies.--This Act applies to Government securities created and issued whether before or after the commencement of this Act by the Central Government or a State Government 2***.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 57 of 1956, s. 4 (w.e.f. 15-10-1956). 2. The words "other than the Government of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 44 of 1972, s. 2 (w.e.f. 1-9-1972).
